mnemonics: VISIBLE Cloud Platform Architecture (Virtualization, Infrastructure, Security, Integration, Business Logic, Elasticity)
keyPoints: Virtualization is the fundamental technology that abstracts physical hardware to create pools of compute, storage, and networking resources.
The architecture is layered, building from virtualized infrastructure (IaaS) to platforms (PaaS) and finally to software (SaaS).
Management and orchestration software (like OpenStack or VMware vSphere) is crucial for automating the provisioning and scaling of resources.
commonMistakes: Assuming virtualization and cloud computing are the same thing (virtualization is an enabling technology, cloud is a service model).
Overlooking the critical role of the management and orchestration layer, which is what makes the cloud automated and 'on-demand'.
